hostingTop.subtitle: UP TO 20X FASTER, Best WordPress HOSTING
hostingTop.title: WordPress Hosting Made Easy
hostingTop.description: Take your website to the next level with our LiteSpeed WordPress Hosting plans and experience our 5x faster loading times than competing services. our WP hosting solutions are precisely built to maximize speed and performance.

pricing.title: Web Hosting Plans That Fit Your Budget
pricing.description: Experience ultra-fast loading speeds globally for seamless performance and reliability anywhere in the world.

supportThree.title: WordPress powers 27% of websites on the Internet
supportThree.description: Build anything - a blog, a static website or an ecommerce shop

items.title: Ready-made Themes
items.description: Choose from over 25,000+ themes available for any type of business, portfolio, or blog.

items.title: SEO-friendly
items.description: With pre-integrated SEO friendly module, drive maximum traffic to your site through search engines.

items.title: Diversified Plugins
items.description: Add features to your websites by installing plugins in a few clicks.

hostingThree.title: It just works Auto-magically
hostingThree.description: Dependable, secure, and high-performing - our hosting solutions grow with your business.

items.title: Auto-Setup
items.description: No need for any legwork - Your WordPress hosting comes pre-configured with the latest version of WordPress and is ready-to-use the moment you buy it.

items.title: Auto-Updates
items.description: Any patches or version upgrades released by WordPress are automatically installed for your packages, not only making your sites future-proof but also more secure.

items.title: Auto-Caching
items.description: Get the best-performing WordPress sites with our Cloud Hosting. With cache and CDN auto-configured on all your packages, pages load much faster with the least amount of resources.

items.title: Auto-Backups
items.description: Get a time machine for all your WordPress sites. With CodeGuard automatically set up for any site you create, your data is always protected and regularly backed up.

featuresTwo.title: Your WordPress Site - powered by our Cloud Hosting
featuresTwo.description: Build your first website with ease using essential hosting features.

items.title: Blazing-Fast Load Time
items.description: With top-of-the-line hardware and caching - which stores your site's most used pages, and a globally distributed CDN, your site is served upto 2x faster.

items.title: Instant Scaling
items.description: No need to move your hosting as your traffic grows. Ramp up your resources at the click of a button - instantly add RAM and CPU without a reboot.

items.title: Automatic Failover
items.description: If we detect a hardware issue, we automatically move your site to another server, ensuring that your site is always up and you never lose traffic.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find quick answers to the most common questions about our hosting plans, services, and features.

items.question: Can I upgrade my WordPress Hosting plan?
items.answer: No, You cannot change upgrade or downgrade plans, however the amount of RAM and CPU cores for your plan can be upgraded.

items.question: Can I add more WordPress installations to an existing plan?
items.answer: No, you cannot add more WordPress installations to any plan. The number of WordPress installations will remain fixed.

items.question: Can SiteLock and CodeGuard packages be upgraded?
items.answer: Currently, the included SiteLock and CodeGuard plans cannot be upgraded.

items.question: Can I use an external email service with WordPress Hosting?
items.answer: Yes, you can use any 3rd party email service for your domain. In case you are using the default name servers provided with WordPress Hosting, please contact our Support team to update the relevant DNS records for your blog.

items.question: Can I use an existing certificate with my blog?
items.answer: No, you cannot use an existing certificate. You will need to generate a CSR from the WordPress Hosting panel and get a certificate issued which can be installed from the panel.

items.question: Will WordPress be updated automatically?
items.answer: Yes, WordPress core updates will be enabled by default.

items.question: Is there a money back period for WordPress Hosting?
items.answer: No, WordPress Hosting does not have a money back period.

items.question: Is Multisite supported with WordPress Hosting?
